## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Airbyte project priorities and next steps for content strategy and delivery](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Project scope expanded significantly; now includes \~7,000 page refreshes, new PSEO, and new editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Engineering resources are the key bottleneck for both refreshes and new PSEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Team recommends prioritizing new content over refreshes for better immediate results](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Need to create clear project timeline and deliverables plan to manage client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

## Topics

### Current Project Status

  - [Data engineering resources batch nearly complete (\~70 pages remaining)](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Next priorities from client:](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Connectors refreshes (620 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [How to Sync folder refreshes (\~6,700 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [New PSEO for industries and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [New editorial content based on product research](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### Refresh vs. New Content Strategy

  - [Refreshes intended as stopgap but require same engineering effort as new pages](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Team recommends prioritizing new content for better immediate results](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Messaging needs to be careful not to completely dismiss value of refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Proposal: Work on both but prioritize new content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

### Resource Allocation and Scope

  - [Current scope of 25-100 pages/week not feasible with expanded project](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Client paying enough to justify dedicated engineering resources](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Need to create project tracker with timelines and work streams](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Adjust weekly deliverable expectations based on content mix (closer to 25 for new, 100 for refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

### Next Steps and Priorities

  - [Create engineering tickets for both refresh and new content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Prioritize setting up new content pipeline (industries first)](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Develop strategy to prioritize 7,000 How to Sync pages after initial 620 Connectors](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Scope out editorial content for new product launch](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Create project timeline and deliverables plan for client visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create project tracker (Linear or Notion) with timelines and work streams](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Submit and prioritize engineering tickets for new content and refresh pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Develop concrete deliverables plan (mix of new/refresh) for next 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Clarify engineering resource allocation with leadership](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Review and address any remaining questions from meeting notes (Carrie to follow up with Jakub/Andi)](https://fathom.video/share/yPsrHqh6L8zzUX4jVZxAB1MUo4St-WD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
